title: P1 UX：日卡回歸舊版視覺並瘦身至單行無捲軸、null 降雨機率隱藏
environment: Executor: ubuntu-dev mainline worktree at /home/esgcenter0/python/Academic/trip-weather-planner using ~/venvs/python-env

context.background: User review of the day strip: (1) the pre-strip card design (as of commit ec4a13b) was visually better — the strip over-simplified; the only real problem with the old cards was width (7 cards wrapped to two rows); (2) current strip cells are still too wide and even scroll on desktop; the weather icon floats far right leaving dead space; (3) days 4-7 show 降雨 —% because CWA only publishes PoP for the first ~3 days (verified: max_pop_percent is null from day 4) — rendering a dash reads as broken.
context.design_direction: This card is a SLIMMED SINGLE-ROW VERSION OF THE OLD CARD DESIGN, not a new invention. Before coding, inspect the old implementation: git show ec4a13b:frontend/src/components/ForecastView.tsx — reuse its card aesthetic (rounded card, date/weekday header, high/low emphasis) and compress it.
context.layout_targets: Move the weather icon left, grouped near the date/weekday instead of right-aligned. Compress each cell toward ~150-170px so 7 cells total ~1050-1200px and fit a 13-inch laptop viewport (~1280 logical px) in ONE row with NO horizontal scrollbar at desktop width. Stack or shrink 高/低 typography as needed. Below ~700px viewport keep the existing container-internal horizontal scroll (industry standard on mobile).

in_scope: C1 rebuild day cells based on the ec4a13b card visual language, compressed: icon left near date/weekday, no dead space on the right, target cell width ~150-170px
C2 desktop/laptop (>= ~1280px viewport): all 7 cells render in one row with no horizontal scrollbar; verify at 1280px
C3 mobile/narrow (< ~700px): container-internal horizontal scroll retained; never wrap to two rows; never page-level horizontal scroll
C4 PoP display: when max_pop_percent is null (CWA publishes PoP only for first ~3 days), hide the 降雨 row entirely — no dash, no placeholder; when present, show 降雨 N% as now
C5 keep all interaction intact: click switches highlight + 行前建議 + 日出日落 in place, keyboard accessible, no scroll jump; selected-state styling adapted to the refined cell
C6 tests: update frontend tests for the refined cell content (icon placement can be structural), null-PoP hiding, and one-row layout class/structure

requirements: R1: No regression of prior cards: layout order (form -> strip -> advice/sunrise -> 72h chart), day-click switching, technical-string purge with 示範資料 badge rule, sunrise date labeling, local-date correctness
R2: Mock mode end-to-end intact; deterministic tests unaffected
R3: English-only code comments; no secrets in tracked files
acceptance_criteria: AC1: ruff + pytest + frontend tests + npm run build all pass
AC2: At 1280px viewport width, 7 day cells render in one row with no horizontal scrollbar (no container overflow at desktop width)
AC3: Weather icon sits left near the date/weekday group; no large dead space inside a cell
AC4: Days with null PoP show no 降雨 row at all; days with PoP show 降雨 N%
AC5: Narrow viewport keeps single-row container-internal horizontal scroll; no wrapping
AC6: Click/keyboard interaction and in-place advice/sunrise switching unchanged
AC7: Changes committed per-AC and pushed to origin
operational_notes: Live-mode town codes are CWA-sourced (e.g. cwa-65000260); read from live /api/towns before manual testing.
Ports 18082/5173 are free at dispatch time; use them or any free ports for live verification and clean up afterward.
Frontend-only card; do not touch backend files.
Verified data fact for C4: /api/forecast max_pop_percent is null from day 4 onward in live mode — this is CWA data coverage, not a backend bug.

report_template.location: Ubuntu agent-bridge reports path or repo-local equivalent used by the current workflow

user_one_liner: Refine the 7-day strip cells back toward the ec4a13b card visual language but compressed to fit one scrollbar-free row at laptop width (icon moved left beside the date, ~150-170px cells), hide the 降雨 row when CWA publishes no PoP (days 4-7), and keep mobile horizontal scroll and all click interactions unchanged.
next_task_hint: Remaining after this: Gemini activation decision, MOENV AQI (deferred), actual cloud deploy (waiting on deploy auth). Submission deadline 2026-07-06 12:00.
